faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Ossining?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control services in Ossining range from $350 to $550 depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment methods required. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What types of crickets are common in Ossining, NY?
faqs.answer: Ossining residents most commonly encounter house crickets, field crickets, and camel crickets (cave crickets). House crickets are drawn indoors seeking warmth and moisture, while camel crickets prefer damp basements and crawl spaces common in older Ossining homes.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Ossining properties can be controlled within 1-2 treatments. You'll notice a significant reduction in cricket activity within 24-48 hours of our initial service, with complete elimination typically achieved within 1-2 weeks depending on infestation severity.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and can discuss pet-friendly and eco-conscious treatment options during your free inspection.
